name: Adjustable Shelf Divider - Brightroom™
description:
Maximize your storage space with style and ease using these 2-Piece Adjustable Shelf Dividers from Brightroom™. Made of recycled PET, these clear shelf dividers help you neatly separate clothes, kitchen items, or office supplies. Plus, the built-in anchors help easily attach to storage systems. Add these to your closet for a neat and tidy space
.
Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
